chunks.title: Eating the Scroll and Journey to Exiles
chunks.reason: Narrative account of the prophet eating the scroll and being transported by the Spirit.

chunks.title: Appointment as Watchman
chunks.reason: God appoints Ezekiel as a watchman and defines his responsibility to warn the wicked and righteous.

chunks.title: Instruction to Be Mute Until Spoken To
chunks.reason: God instructs Ezekiel to shut himself in his house and explains the condition of his muteness.
